name: Nemotron Super 70B Instruct
description: NVIDIA Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B — high-capability LLM optimized by NVIDIA for alignment and instruction following. Requires 80 GB+ VRAM (multi-GPU). Best for enterprise accuracy requirements.

params.prompt: You are an expert AI assistant. Analyze the competitive landscape of GPU compute marketplaces in the Middle East.

model_cache.behavior: Warm cache — large model (~140 GB) cached on high-VRAM multi-GPU providers. LRU eviction when disk pressure exceeds threshold.

params.prompt: Write a detailed technical specification for a GPU scheduling system.

tier_notes: On-demand tier — requires multi-GPU provider (2x A100 80GB or better). Model pulled from HuggingFace cache on job start. First-run cold start ~15 min.
